name: sidebar-menu
visual_summary: The sidebar-menu component is a horizontal menu placed on the side of a screen, typically within a sidebar or a panel. It's used to display a list of main navigation items or actions, often collapsible, and can be shown/hidden with user interaction.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready navbar component with the following characteristics:

Name: sidebar-menu
Description: The sidebar-menu component is a horizontal menu placed on the side of a screen, typically within a sidebar or a panel. It's used to display a list of main navigation items or actions, often collapsible, and can be shown/hidden with user interaction.
Style: minimal, modern
Interactions: collapsible, toggleable, responsive
Tags: navigation, sidebar, menu, mobile-friendly, responsive

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
